Code definition (union).description: Named code (type) using a tagged union

Code definition (recursive union).description: Recursive named code as a tagged union (e.g. nat, list)

Composition.description: Function composition: apply f then g

Merge.description: Merge: try f first, fall back to g

Product combinator.description: Product combinator: apply functions in parallel, collect into a record

Filter (union).description: Filter expression constraining a union type, binding the subtype variable

Filter (product).description: Filter expression constraining a product type, binding the subtype variable

Type annotation.description: Type annotation: pin expression output to a named code

Typed input constraint.description: Typed product input constraint: ${ type label, ... }

Identity.description: Identity function: pass value through unchanged

Empty product (unit leaf).description: Empty product: the only leaf value in non-recursive definitions
